calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-09-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Marc T. Defalu, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, BANK OF THE WEST.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) PROTOTYPE PRODUCTIONS, INC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $148,237.80
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $4,650.00
Costs: $708.45
Total Judgment in the amount of $153,596.25
7. Other: Judgment of possession for plaintiff of the equipment described in Exhibit A. Attached to Judgment (see scanned judgment).
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2015 Continued To Aug-19-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
